Class AbstractSettingsOption

java.lang.Object
org.nevertouchgrass.prolific.javafxcontroller.settings.AbstractSettingsOption
All Implemented Interfaces:
SettingsOption
Direct Known Subclasses:
SettingsOptionEnvironment, SettingsOptionGeneral
public abstract class AbstractSettingsOption extends Object implements SettingsOption
